content.text:
I understand. I'm ready to help you with tasks in the llm-harness project. This is a warmup message, so no action is needed at this time.

When you have a task, I can help with:
- Implementing pending features (MILE-026, MILE-031, MILE-039, etc.)
- Running tests and checking status
- Working with the harness session commands
- Git operations and commits
- Any other development tasks

Just let me know what you need.
